hero.title: BUILT FOR PEOPLE. DRIVEN BY COMMUNITY.
breath.text_one: We help people transform their lives through movement, discipline, and sport.
breath.text_two: From mental resilience to physical well-being, our team supports every stage of your personal and athletic journey.
community.title: Our Community
trainers.title: Meet Our Coaches
trainers.text_one: Dedicated coaches and trusted specialists working together to support your growth.
trainers.text_two: From fitness to nutrition and mental performance specialist
diogo-description: With over 10 years of experience working with clients across different ages, backgrounds, and performance levels, Diogo has developed a distinctive approach to human development and athletic performance. From professional athletes to individuals training in various modalities, he combines technical expertise with a deep understanding of mindset, discipline, and long-term progression.
marcelo-description: Specialized in working with football players, backed by a successful professional career across multiple countries. With over 15 years of elite competitive experience, Marcelo understands the physical and mental demands of high-performance sport. After being mentored by Team Turco during his athletic career, he now brings his expertise and leadership to our professional team.
magno-occupation: Sports Nutritionist | MSc in Food, Nutrition & Health
magno-description-one: Magno is a certified nutritionist with a Master's degree in Food, Nutrition, and Health, specialized in the physiological foundations of personalized training, sports nutrition, and advanced medicine. He combines scientific depth with real-world athletic application, delivering performance-based nutritional strategies tailored to each individual.
magno-description-two: His approach integrates clinical knowledge with high-performance sport demands, ensuring every athlete receives a data-driven, individualized strategy.
jordi-quote: Strength is not only physical - it is mental.
jordi-description: Jordi supports individuals navigating anxiety, stress, emotional challenges, and personal transitions. His mission is to help you rebuild emotional stability, strengthen self-esteem, and regain control over your thoughts and decisions. Through a structured and practical approach, he transforms overwhelm into clarity and instability into strength.
charles-quote: High performance is built through science and precision.
charles-description: Charles specializes in Health & Performance Management for athletes, integrating physiotherapy, exercise physiology, and performance science into structured systems designed for elite results. With national and international experience, he delivers strategic support focused on injury prevention, recovery optimization, and competitive excellence.
ramon-quote: Peak performance begins with structured health.
ramon-description: His method integrates physiotherapy, training, recovery, and wellness into a strategic system designed to prevent injuries and optimize results. Through science-based structure and personalized follow-up, he helps athletes unlock their full physical potential.
partner.text_one: Beyond our core team, we work alongside highly skilled professionals committed to supporting your journey every step of the way.
join-description: Start your journey with a team focused on performance, discipline, and long-term growth.
about-description_one: At Team Turco we take a holistic approach understanding that every individual is complex with different needs, goals, and challenges.
about-description_two: From peak performance to wellness, our multidisciplinary team is dedicated to support your unique journey by focusing on three key pillars:
about-bullet-one: Physical: Personalized training, strategic injury prevention and recovery optimization
about-bullet-two: Mental: Habits development, mental resilience, and strong frame of mind foundations
agency-history-title_one: It all started in the tropical city of Rio de Janeiro
agency-history-description_one: Team Turco was founded by Diogo Turco with a clear vision —
agency-history-description_two_span: to help people and transform lives building a wellness-driven community.
agency-history-description_two: To all target groups, across all levels of performance, what began as a local initiative in Brazil has grown into a global network of athletes and elite trainers across Europe and South America.
agency-history-title_two: From local roots to international stands...
agency-history-description_three: Rooted in discipline, mindset, and long-term development through sport, our approach is built around the human touch and overall well-being.
agency-history-description_four: Today, Team Turco works with athletes from multiple disciplines — delivering personalized training built around performance, character development, and long-term success.
breath-about: Individuality and meaningful relationships are at the heart of everything we do.
mission-description: To help people transform their lives through sport, discipline, and human development — building stronger bodies, resilient minds, and sustainable lifestyles.
goal-description: To support individuals in their daily evolution, helping them build healthy, sustainable lifestyles — while expanding Team Turco’s impact to reach and inspire more people around the world.
athletes.title: Our Athletes
athletes.approachDescription: We believe every individual is unique, which is why we support each athlete through a holistic and personalized approach. By understanding their specific needs, goals, and lifestyle, we focus on building lasting habits that promote wellness, long-term performance, and sustainable career development.
athletes.performance.title: Performance Training
athletes.performance.description: Our performance training programs are designed to enhance athletic abilities, focusing on strength, speed, agility, and endurance.
athletes.injury.title: Injury Prevention
athletes.injury.description: We implement strategies and exercises to minimize the risk of injuries, ensuring athletes maintain peak performance levels.
athletes.career.title: Career Development
athletes.career.description: We provide guidance and support for athletes to navigate their careers, helping them achieve long-term success both on and off the field.
athletes.mental.title: Mental Performance
athletes.mental.description: We offer mental performance coaching to help athletes develop focus, resilience, and a winning mindset.
athletes.find.title: Find our athletes
athletes.high-performance.label: High Performance Athletes ⚡
athletes.high-performance.title: WHERE PERFORMANCE COMES FIRST
athletes.high-performance.description: Our high-performance division with world wide athletes where we provide training, prevention, and career management for highest level competitors
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Contact us to learn more about our training programs and how we can help you achieve your athletic goals.
contact.responseTime: Responses might take 1-2 days from us to email you back.
contact.form.name: Full Name:
contact.form.subject: Subject:
high-performance.hero.subtitle: ELITE SUPPORT, ELITE ATHLETES
high-performance.elite.title: Elite Performance Environment
high-performance.elite.description1: At Team Turco, we understand that elite athletes require more than physical training to reach their full potential.
high-performance.elite.description2: Our environment combines world-class facilities, advanced performance analytics, and a multidisciplinary team of experts dedicated to maximizing athletic output.
high-performance.elite.description3: From state-of-the-art training centers to individualized nutrition strategies and mental conditioning programs, we create the conditions where athletes can consistently perform at the highest level.
high-performance.athletes.title: Elite Athletes
